title.rendered: Take off with a Helijet Career – Jet Flight Crew

content.rendered:
Updated February 10, 2016
If joining a close-knit family of 145+ colleagues, many of them with decades of experience, in a successful and growing local company sounds right for you, then take a look at the Helijet Careers page. We are presently seeking experienced pilots for our turbojet operations, (yes, we have more than just helicopters) based at our hanger on the south side of Vancouver International Airport.

We hope to welcome you to the family soon.

Visit the Helijet Careers page to see if these postings are right for you or if you’d like to leave a resume for future reference you can to that there too.
